name: frontier_port
description: Battle Port hall clear (q.side_frontier_hall lane): Captain Stern and Sailor Crest (one_time rotating-roster challengers, defeat tags via TBCS onwin), then Port Admiral Horatio (brain, recognition_tier late, battle button 'Challenge Admiral Horatio' gated all_tags on both defeats) whose on_win runs frontier/hall_cleared and tags frontier_port_cleared. Horatio is the ONE GEN_9_DOUBLES brain in this wave - the 2x lv-100 Garchomp party is load-bearing, doubles needs two conscious mons on the player's side. The champion gate is opened by tag surgery (royal_league_champion - gate.champion lowers to that player tag); stripped in cleanup. The Port trio shares the cluster with the co-located market group (~5b apart) - full display-name needles keep matches unique; NEVER shorten 'Captain Stern' (the 'Stern' stem is a substring of 'Market Mogul Sterling'). Site is inside the frontier_active region-tick AABB (Nuzlocke faint paths suspended - 'nothing of yours goes down'); atlas re-survey open, hence _probe_pending. KNOWN CAVEAT: intermittent TBCS battle-init stall / rare showdown wedge - a win-wait timeout is almost certainly that, not a hall regression; re-run before filing.

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog, sweep a stale battle --

-- tp FIRST (loaded chunks for the kill sweep + the 40b latches spawn Stern/Crest/Horatio on a fresh world). Coordinate is the shipped RCT pier line (ch1 3785.5 / ch2 3791.5 at z2990.5, brain 3788.5 z2996.5), stood 2b north - _probe_pending until the first live run confirms the floor --

steps.comment_: plateau is outside any safe zone; frontier_active only suspends Nuzlocke faint paths, not real mob damage

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag this scenario or its battles set, plus the champion gate surgery. No latch resets - the bodies persist and are never killed here --

steps.comment_: gate.champion lowers to this player tag; stripped in cleanup
band_tags must re-derive the no_* inverses after the removals before any dialog opens

steps.comment: -- lane sanity: champion gate open, nothing defeated, hall uncleared --
-- party reset: junk parties stall TBCS battle init (verified live). Empty all six slots, then 2x lv-100 Garchomp - two mons REQUIRED for Horatio's doubles format --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- beat 1: Captain Stern, the docker on shift. say[] rotates, so the screen assert targets the stable battle-button label (its rendering IS the champion-gate assert) --

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side (autobattle) while the stale dialog stays up
Stern's onwin win_line say; a timeout here is almost certainly the TBCS stall, not a regression
battle teardown settle before the next TBCS dispatch

steps.comment: -- beat 2: Sailor Crest, the rotating rival --

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side
battle teardown settle + band_tags window before the brain's all_tags gate is read

steps.comment: -- beat 3: Port Admiral Horatio, the deep berth - DOUBLES. His button gates all_tags on both challenger defeats - it rendering now IS the ladder assert. Win chain: prize -> frontier_port_cleared tag -> win say -> frontier/hall_cleared (actionbar) --

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side
doubles at the ceiling runs longer than the singles halls - widest win window of the wave
frontier/hall_cleared actionbar - fires from Horatio's on_win right after the win say

steps.comment: -- beat 4: cleared-state dialog - Horatio's beaten entry (prio 20, gate frontier_port_cleared) preempts; prose any-of covers both rotating say lines (the late-tier recognition beat included) --

expect_screen_text: You took the deep water off me, Champion. I ran this dock when the Company still built for wonder instead of the ledger - and I know the face that dedicated it. I keep that to myself. Fair seas out past the halls.
The Port is yours. The rain, the swell, the whole gauntlet. Whatever you were before you washed up here, you earned the harbor honestly - that is more than most.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: strip everything this scenario set so no other scenario inherits the lane; CD prizes ride (the prize rail has no reset) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
